description: Evidence mapping for the DTR Respiratory Assist Device questionnaire. PBD.1-PBD.6, 3.1, and 3.2 execute the questionnaire's own embedded CQL prepopulation expressions (see data/cql/) against the patient's chart. 4.2/4.5 remain keyword_search since they depend on narrative clinical-note text, not coded data -- CQL isn't the right tool for that. Items with no rule (PND.*, SIGPNP.*, 4.1, 4.3, 4.4, 4.6.*, 4.7.*) require ordering-provider or order-form data not present in a patient chart, and are reported as 'not_applicable' rather than 'gap'.

PBD.3.description: Middle initial is not always present -- a patient with no middle name is a valid answer, not a documentation gap

3.2.description: Comorbidities/other diagnoses (obesity, hypertension, CHF, neuromuscular disease) supporting medical necessity of a RAD over a standard CPAP -- matched against a coded ICD-10 valueset, not free text

4.2.description: Type of device order (bilevel w/ or w/o backup rate)
